text.tspan: Tool dispatch timing on a single turn

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: Geist, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; fill: rgb(205, 205, 205); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

g.text: Δt = time saved per tool call. The standard server waits for end of stream; Dynamo dispatches the moment the call is parsed.
